title: nie-core: WASM-conditional platform deps
description:
## What
Make nie-core compile for wasm32-unknown-unknown by moving non-WASM-compatible deps and modules behind cfg() guards. nie-core's pure crypto modules (identity, auth, hpke, messages, protocol) must compile for both native and wasm32.

## Algorithm
1. In `core/Cargo.toml`, move these deps to [target.'cfg(not(target_arch = "wasm32"))'.dependencies]:
   - tokio (all features)
   - tokio-tungstenite
   - tokio-socks
   - native-tls
   - rpassword
   Keep these unconditional (already WASM-safe): ed25519-dalek, x25519-dalek, sha2, serde, serde_json, serde_with, anyhow, thiserror, uuid, base64, rand, tracing, futures, hpke, openmls, openmls_rust_crypto, openmls_basic_credential, tls_codec, bip39, blake2b_simd, age, chrono
2. Add [target.'cfg(target_arch = "wasm32")'.dependencies]:
   - getrandom = { version = '0.2', features = ['js'] }
   This ensures WASM builds get browser crypto for RNG.
3. In `core/src/lib.rs`, wrap platform-specific module declarations:
   - #[cfg(not(target_arch = "wasm32"))] pub mod transport;
   - #[cfg(not(target_arch = "wasm32"))] pub mod keyfile;
   Leave all other mods (identity, auth, hpke, messages, protocol, mls, wallet) unconditional.
4. Check if mls.rs has any tokio usage — grep for 'tokio'. If found, add cfg guard.
5. Check if wallet.rs has any tokio/sqlx usage — if found, add cfg guard.
6. Run cargo check -p nie-core (native must still pass)
7. Run cargo test -p nie-core (all existing tests must still pass)
8. Run cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p nie-core (WASM must now pass)

## Defensive programming
- Add a comment above every cfg() guard explaining what is excluded and why
- Do NOT remove any functionality from native builds — only add cfg guards
- Every existing test must still pass on native

## Agent team
Standard: Researcher reads core/Cargo.toml and core/src/lib.rs + each flagged module; Implementer makes only the minimum necessary changes; Validator runs cargo check/test for both targets.

## Tests
- cargo check -p nie-core exits 0
- cargo test -p nie-core exits 0 (no tests removed or broken)
- cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p nie-core exits 0
acceptance_criteria: cargo check -p nie-core exits 0; cargo test -p nie-core exits 0; cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p nie-core exits 0; no previously passing tests broken
close_reason: nie-core WASM-compatible; cargo check wasm32 passes; all native tests pass
